scenarios.description: appendChild invalidates pre-populated shadowChildrenRef cache (nodelistChanged) on Element children list
scenarios.precondition: parent Element has had children() called to populate shadowChildrenRef
scenarios.expectedResult: shadowChildrenRef is cleared and childElementsList recomputes fresh list containing only real Element children
pseudocode: TEST TC06 appendChild invalidates shadow cache
// warm up the shadow cache with children() on empty
// reflectively invoke childElementsList to force recompute

scenarios.description: appendChild reparenting from old parent with multiple children removes only that child and updates siblingIndex
scenarios.precondition: oldParent has two existing children before moving one to newParent
scenarios.expectedResult: oldParent childNodes size decrements by one, newParent gets the moved child at index 0, siblingIndex reset
pseudocode: TEST TC07 appendChild reparent from multi-child parent
// oldParent loses only the moved child
// newParent has exactly the moved child
